gaps.missingSurface: Calm-completion and queue-recompute consumers for NextTaskLaunchLease are not yet the authoritative readiness sink.
gaps.temporaryFallback: Reopen restoration pins TaskLaunchContext with TASK_241_QUEUE_RECALC_REQUIRED and keeps next-task launch blocked until a fresh queue snapshot and continuity tuple are issued.
gaps.riskIfUnresolved: 241 can govern reopen and launch rights, but it does not yet certify calm completion or consume the lease into final continuity proof.
gaps.followUpAction: Bind WorkspaceContinuityEvidenceProjection and TaskCompletionSettlementEnvelope to NextTaskLaunchLease in 242.

gaps.missingSurface: Close-time eager release for resolved and handoff triage leases is not yet centralized.
gaps.expectedOwnerTask: future lifecycle or direct-resolution cleanup work
gaps.temporaryFallback: 241 detects detached active triage leases on reopen, releases them with reopen_reacquire, and then reacquires a fresh reopen lease before mutation.
gaps.riskIfUnresolved: Closed work that never reopens can retain a detached control-plane lease longer than intended, even though reopened work is now fail-safe.
gaps.followUpAction: Move detached-lease cleanup from reopen repair into the canonical close and handoff completion path.
